2004-06-26‚ÄéI like chicken. Tastes good and makes a change from carbs.
2004-06-25‚ÄéThe Feeder went to something called SUPERCOMM and left with me with Aunt Sabrina. She's a very fun girl - had me out and about
column2: running in my ball every night. Kind of miss being over there actually.

column1: 2004-06-20‚ÄéurlLink    I like my ball  The Feeder
2004-06-19‚Äé"that party thing was very disruptive. Despite being placed in The Feeder's bedroom
column2: I had multiple intrusions all evening. A drunken British girl slurred over me ""hesss reaallll
column3: not stuffed"" -- very disturbing. I'm hoping The Feeder is suitably hungover today and won't be as loud tonight."

column1: 2004-06-17‚ÄéMy cage was cleaned tonight and I got to run around on The Feeders arm. A friend of The Feeder was over and I was fed pizza (yum!!)
column2: then they made mini cupcakes (drunk). All I hear is 'Party'. I'm hoping that means I get some cupcake and can wear a nice hat.

column1: 2004-06-14‚ÄéWholefoods fresh egg pasta is yum. Almost as good as the rice from Naan and Curry. I'm craving pizza too.. maybe The Feeder will treat me soon
column2: I hear Pizza Orgasmica does a great spinach and feta combo.

column1: 2004-06-12‚ÄéurlLink    Peekaboo  The Feeder

2004-06-06‚ÄéThe Feeder cleaned my cage today - lucky because the sawdust had blocked my tube to the play area. I'd been stuck in my sleeping zone for two days. Not that I minded much as all I want to do is sleep anyway.
2004-06-06‚ÄéThe Feeder's friend foiled my attempt at escape tonight. After consuming two vodka tonics
column2: The Feeder was unware that the latch on my home wasn't entirely locked. Sadly she figured out the escape bid when I rattled the roof a little too loud. I'm hoping the friend comes back with more vodka so I can try again.

column1: 2004-06-04‚ÄéThe Feeder came home from work at 7.30pm and tried to wake me up. I simply opened one eye and curled further up in the nice tube in my cage. Doesn't she know I don't wake up until 11pm
2004-06-03‚ÄéurlLink    My new home urlLink

2004-06-03‚ÄéDidn't like the mazda miata ride very much. Way too bumpy. I just curled up in my tube until we got to North Beach which seems nice. Not sure about the dead animals everywhere.. will sleep tonight and ponder the animals tomorrow.
2004-07-31‚ÄéThe Feeder has left me. Again. Auntie Sabrina is very nice though. She talks to me more than The Feeder does
column2: and she doesn't call me rat. Also seems to stumble in drunk less (or maybe that is because The Feeder isn't here to drink martinis with her). Oh well
column3: makes a change from seeing Tucky the cat drooling over me.

column1: 2004-07-26‚ÄéurlLink    Fighting The Feeder for some more carbs  The Feeder
2004-07-25‚ÄéI'm going to Auntie Sabrina's for 10 days. I'm hoping she drinks less than The Feeder and buys some carbs for me.
2004-07-20‚ÄéThe Feeder and her friend came home at 7.30pm. I was half awake
column2: but then they talked to me. And for some reason
column4: that I fell asleep again. I like martini fumes. Bring on Belvedere martinis

column1: 2004-07-16‚ÄéurlLink    Me being caught after another escape attempt  The Feeder
2004-07-10‚ÄéurlLink    I like apple and peach crumble.   The Feeder
2004-07-09‚ÄéurlLink    Exploring my new penthouse cage attachment. All I need now is a leopard skin couch and a good stereo system.   The Feeder
2004-07-09‚ÄéEscaped again yesterday. I like freedom. Just a shame The Feeder almost squashed me when she came home drunk.
2004-07-03‚Äé"The Feeder is betraying me. I kept hearing her saying ""here Tucky
column2: Tucky"" and couldn't understand what she was talking about. Now I know. She is feeding a cat. The ultimate hamster enemy. I am not impressed. I'm sharpening my teeth for the next time The Feeder comes into my cage."

column1: 2004-07-01‚ÄéThe English bloke dropped me. I discovered dust bunnies and leftover chinese crackers behind the sofa. The Feeder managed to catch me by offering up a biscuit. I like biscuits.
2004-07-01‚ÄéurlLink    Actually
column2: I like the English bloke now  The Feeder

column1: 2004-07-01‚ÄéThere is a man in the flat who hates hamsters. I can tell. He isn't at all friendly and tried to kick my ball when I was in it.
2004-08-05‚ÄéI like having my tummy tickled. Auntie Sabrina tickled me this week and I curled up in delight. I only wish she'd learn how to pick me up
column2: then I might get tickled more. Oh well. I wonder when The Feeder is coming back. Although
column3: I quite like living in the Marina. Lots of cute blondes over here.
